title: Ban Video Creator 1.0.3 da san sang
message: Ban cai dat Video Creator 1.0.3 da san sang trong khu vuc tai khoan voi ban sua loi luu anh va video.
notes: Ban nay duoc phat hanh qua Web Tong va kich hoat bang key trung tam
Neu khong thay nut tai hoac key, vui long lien he ho tro de doi chieu entitlement
App hien tai phat hanh update qua Web Tong, chua co popup thong bao update tu dong trong app
